overview.description: AI-powered pricing optimization and management (PO&M) and CPQ software for B2B enterprises
overview.description_long: Pricefx is a global leader in cloud-native SaaS pricing software, providing a complete AI price optimization and management platform for large B2B enterprises in manufacturing, distribution, and process engineering. The platform includes price optimization, configure-price-quote (CPQ), rebate management, and generative AI-powered pricing assistants. Prague serves as the company's European Competence HQ with the Czech entity Price f(x) s.r.o. registered in Karlín.

history.origin_story: Founded by Marcin Cichon in Germany (Munich area) with a vision to democratize pricing software with a cloud-native, affordable SaaS solution. Prague became a major development and operations hub early on.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Germany by Marcin Cichon
First funding round led by Talis Capital and Credo Ventures
Series B funding led by Digital+ Partners and Bain & Company; awarded Gartner Cool Vendor of Digital Commerce
Acquired Brennus Analytics (France) to strengthen AI/ML price optimization capabilities
Raised $65M Series C led by Apax Digital; total funding reached $130M
New Prague office opened in Karlín district
Ronak Sheth promoted to CEO; Marcin Cichon remains as Founder and co-CEO
66% ARR growth in H1 2022; over 150 customers and 500+ employees
Launched additional Generative AI capabilities including conversational pricing assistant

awards: Gartner Cool Vendor of Digital Commerce 2018
Gold Stevie Award – Best Financial Management Solution 2022
Gold Stevie Award – Best Manufacturing Solution 2022
Gold Globee – Best SaaS Solution for Sales 2022

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Pricefx offers deep vertical SaaS with domain-specific pricing workflows, CPQ, and rebate management — capabilities beyond simple LLM prompting. However, their AI-powered price optimization is increasingly replicable by foundation models, and enterprise pricing analytics is a space that large platform vendors (SAP, Oracle, Salesforce) may encroach on with native AI capabilities.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: The B2B pricing optimization market is well-established with clear ROI (15x claimed in year 1), 150+ enterprise customers including global brands, and strong partner ecosystem. Pricefx achieved 66% ARR growth in H1 2022, confirming real demand.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Well-funded with $130M total raised through Series C led by Apax Digital (a major PE/growth investor). The company has enterprise contracts with multi-million dollar annual subscriptions and strong growth trajectory.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Strong enterprise customer base with proven ROI, $130M in funding, and vertical specialization in manufacturing/distribution pricing provide significant resilience. The medium AGI displacement risk is offset by deep customer integration, proprietary algorithms, and workflow lock-in.

metadata.notes: Prague is the European Competence HQ; legal entity Price f(x) s.r.o. registered at Thámova 32, Prague. Company HQ is legally registered in Germany (Price f(x) AG, Pfaffenhofen near Munich). Founding year estimated at 2012 based on '10 years ago' reference in 2021 Series C letter and '5 years before' reference from 2016 CRO hire. 96% Glassdoor recommendation rate cited on careers page but no specific rating/review count available without direct Glassdoor access.
